text: A special team has been set up in the newsroom for the review of its proceedings in case of emergency circumstances such as last Friday's hacker attack. Investigations confirmed a hacking attack on the agency's servers. PAP identified the source of the leaked data which was used to publish two texts with false information. The articles were immediately cancelled and the data secured.
attribution_coding_note: PAP confirms 'a hacking attack on the agency's servers' and identifies the leaked-data source; no external actor named in the stored text.
